# stalwart_group (Data Source)

Reads an existing mail group from Stalwart Mail Server.

## Example Usage

```terraform
data "stalwart_group" "info" {
  name = "info-example"
}

output "group_primary_email" {
  value = data.stalwart_group.info.primary_email
}

output "group_aliases" {
  value = data.stalwart_group.info.aliases
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `name` (String) Internal group name to look up.

### Read-Only

- `aliases` (List of String) Additional delivery addresses for this group.
- `description` (String) Human-readable description.
- `disabled_permissions` (List of String) Permissions explicitly denied for this group.
- `enabled_permissions` (List of String) Permissions explicitly granted to this group.
- `external_members` (List of String) External email addresses that also receive mail sent to this group.
- `primary_email` (String) Primary delivery address (index 0 in Stalwart's emails array).
- `type` (String) Principal type: list or group.
